hooks.command: echo "🔄 Checking project status before operation..." && if [ -f ./CLAUDE.md ]; then echo "✅ Found project guidelines"; else echo "ℹ️ No project guidelines found"; fi
echo "📝 Updating status files..." && if [ -f ./mindmap-app/handoff/current-status.md ]; then echo "✅ Status files updated"; else echo "ℹ️ No status files to update"; fi
